name: nutri-plan

review.evidence: Independent spec and standards reviews accepted the final process-only diff after product identity, skill mirrors, graph tours, idempotency, and evidence binding were corrected.

qaSelection.reason: The pilot changes process and knowledge artifacts, but the repository policy selected the complete changed verification and local browser matrix before the human gate.
qaSelection.evidence: pnpm verify:changed passed 3,090 unit tests and all static gates; the full local Playwright CLI covered 55 targets and a focused smoke covered 7 E2E tests.

checks.evidence: Understand graph validates with 5,555 nodes, 8,272 edges, 8 layers, and 20 preserved tour steps without warnings or stale findings.
Lint, architecture, Convex, typecheck, 3,090 unit tests, and the changed-surface policy exited 0.

checks.command: pnpm test:e2e plus Playwright CLI local target matrix
checks.evidence: Seven focused smoke tests and all 55 local browser targets completed successfully.
Codex and Factory loaded the repository mirrors and reproduced the canonical PostHog SDK, forbidden capture mechanism, and correlation headers; T3Code shares the Codex adapter observation.

checks.command: curl protected develop dashboard, admin dashboard, and landing URLs
checks.evidence: All three stable develop runtime targets returned HTTP 200; the pilot has no product-runtime diff.
Plan, lint, typecheck, unit, E2E, quality, and gate jobs passed; product deployment lanes correctly skipped the process-only diff.

residualRisks: The feature branch contains only process, skill-adapter, and Understand graph bytes, so policy does not create a branch deployment; human review must inspect those bytes in PR #189 while the protected develop runtime proves unchanged product behavior.
